ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviated name for the team (e.g., MF, WAH) */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the division */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the division was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game (e.g., 10-5) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "pct" REAL /* Winning percentage */,
  "gb" REAL /* Games behind */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played */,
  "rf" INTEGER /* Runs for */,
  "ra" INTEGER /* Runs against */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team in the division */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties in the season */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the team in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Can the user view the team's data? */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Can the user edit the team's data? */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., CSV, API) */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "import_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the import (e.g., error messages) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_warehouse" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data warehouse entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., wins, losses) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., CSV, API, manual entry) */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_warehouse_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_warehouse_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_intelligence" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, trend) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_intelligence_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_intelligence_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
